$comment: Image slots for AI-generated artwork. Each slot maps to a file in public/images/. Slots set to null render with the design system's pattern/color fallbacks until an image is provided.

guidelines.style: Warm, editorial photography or illustration. Zellige green (#0E5A4E), terracotta (#C4502F), sand (#F1E8D8) palette. No stock-photo clichés, no camels-at-sunset.
guidelines.hero: Medina alley with light falling across plaster walls, or a calm overhead of a tiled courtyard.
guidelines.city-*: One distinctive, non-obvious visual per city (Marrakech: derb doorway; Casablanca: tram + art deco; Rabat: Oudayas blue-white lane).
